name: notification_and_alerting
description: Ability to surface task completion status and important alerts to the user
instructions_md: Use notify_desktop to alert the user when a long-running task completes or when their input is needed. Keep notification titles concise (under 50 characters) and messages informative but brief. Set timeout to 10 seconds for important alerts, 5 seconds for informational notifications. If plyer is not available, the tool falls back to a console print — the notification will still be recorded in the execution log. Do not spam notifications for intermediate steps — use them only for completion events or genuine alerts.
